content:
# Why not stack strength and tentacle damage via full aqua team?
I find tentacle damage + tentacle amount + tentacle assembly stacking to be underwhelming when faced with end game bosses will millions of HP so I want to stack team crit instead and hope it deals at least 2m damage.

# Team crit buff list:
Tulu: exalt 25% temporary crit rate, 3 cost 15% temporary crit rate 
Corpo: exalt 20% crit damage + 10% per death res trigger 
Corpo wheel: 20% temporary crit damage + 1 per tentacle 
Horla: exalt 28% temporary crit rate and damage, overexalt 58% instead. 
Miryam wheel: 15% temporary crit damage 
Miryam: 2 cost 15% of miryam original crit damage gets turned to team crit damage 
To my dearest friend wheel: 25% temporary crit rate 
Murphy event wheel: 10% temporary crit rate and damage per posse
Rat: exalt 70% temporary crit damage, rouse 15% temporary crit damage per hit upto 5 times
Goliath posse: 15% crit rate and damage 

# Putting the numbers together:
Assume exalt all, posse x2  [if cat notes is true we can do that], 10 tentacles, 1 death res trigger:
I'll ignore Crit rate math as it is far over 100%.
**Crit Damage:**
70x2 [rat exalt] +
15x5 [rat rouse] +
20+number of tentacles x2 [corpo wheel] +
10x2 [Murphy event wheel] + 
15 [Miryam wheel] +
15 [Goliath posse] +
20+10xdeath res triggers [corpo exalt] + 
58 [horla overexalt]
= 418% crit damage

Need to wait until https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1368890341490556948
Becomes real. The tentacle regeneration will really help.
I am too poor to test this but I hope someone picks up my research <:cry2:1356068126894194758>
I strongly believe rat with corpo wheel buff bot is real. <:pray:1356053116260454534>

jenkin Rouse ?
more crit damage, and you stack it for free with her cards if you're doing exalt x2
would be 15x5 so +75%
